name: Telegram
description: Cloud-based instant messaging service focused on speed, security, and cross-device sync.

years.notes: Original launch mark (Telegram 1.x): dark blue square background with an angular white paper plane carrying subtle blue-gray gradients. Source viewBox 0 0 16 16 wrapped in a 24x24 scale group (baked at build via SVGO convertTransform).

First circular redesign: lighter sky-blue vertical gradient with a smoother white paper plane that includes subtle inner shadows. Used 2014-2019. Source viewBox 0 0 240 240 wrapped in a 24x24 scale group (baked at build via SVGO convertTransform).

Current mark (Telegram 5.x+), mobile-optimized: simplified flat paper plane with single inner fold over a vertical blue gradient circle. Sourced from official Android app v5.6. Source viewBox 0 0 240.1 240.1 wrapped in a 24x24 scale group (baked at build via SVGO convertTransform).
